observe: Layer by layer, this is how it's built — Cocoa Touch down to Core OS. Every layer exists to protect the one beneath it.
fault: Something just skipped straight to the bottom layer. That's not allowed here — every layer exists for a reason.
repair: Walk it top to bottom. Respect each layer's boundary.
escape: No shortcuts through the stack. Confirm every layer in order.

observe: iOS architecture layers from Cocoa Touch down to Core OS.
fault: An application attempted to bypass intermediate architecture layers.
repair: Identify each layer from Cocoa Touch to Core OS.
escape: Confirm all layers before time expires.

hints: Each layer only talks to the one directly above or below it — never skips.
